/* Generated by Font Squirrel (http://www.fontsquirrel.com) on October 22, 2014 @font-face { font-family: 'Bree Serif'; src: url('/community-library/accounts/92/920117/breeserif-regular.eot'); src: url('/community-library/accounts/92/920117/breeserif-regular.eot?#iefix') format('embedded-opentype'), url('/community-library/accounts/92/920117/breeserif-regular.woff') format('woff'), url('/community-library/accounts/92/920117/breeserif-regular.ttf') format('truetype'), url('/community-library/accounts/92/920117/breeserif-regular.svg#bree_serifregular') format('svg'); font-weight: normal; font-style: normal; } */ .mb5{ margin-bottom: 5px !important; } .mb10{ margin-bottom: 10px !important; } .mb15{ margin-bottom: 15px !important; } .mb20{ margin-bottom: 20px !important; } .mb30{ margin-bottom: 30px !important; } .mb80{ margin-bottom: 80px !important; } .ml0{ margin-left: 0 !important; } .mt10{ margin-top: 10px !important; } .mt20{ margin-top: 20px !important; } .text-center{ text-align: center; } .bold{ font-weight: 700 !important; } .lblue-text{ color: #63A9F9 !important; } .landing, body{ font-family: "Arial" !important; } .landing-page, .landing-container{ width: 1030px; overflow: hidden; margin: 0 auto; } /** HEADER STYLES**/ .landing-header, #page #header{ -webkit-background-color: #0219C4 ; -moz-background-color: #0219C4 ; background-color: #0219C4 ; background-image: -o-linear-gradient(right, #0219C4 0%, #000C75 100%) !important; background-image: -moz-linear-gradient(right, #0219C4 0%, #000C75 100%) !important; background-image: -webkit-linear-gradient(right, #0219C4 0%, #000C75 100%) !important; background-image: -ms-linear-gradient(right, #0219C4 0%, #000C75 100%) !important; background-image: linear-gradient(to right, #0219C4 0%, #000C75 100%) !important; overflow: hidden; position: relative; } .landing-header{ padding-top: 23px; } .landing-header:after{ content: ""; background: #F3F3F3; border-bottom: 2px solid #0296FD; z-index: 0; position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; height: 40px; width: 100%; } .landing-header .map, #header .map{ float: right; margin: 0; color: #FFF; font-size: 21px; line-height: 58px; } #header .map{ margin: 22px 10px 0 0; } .landing-header .landing-nav{ clear: both; position: relative; z-index: 10; } .landing-header .logo, .landing-nav > li, .header-nav > li{ float: left; } .landing-nav > li, .header-nav > li{ margin-right: 18px; } .landing-header .landing-nav > li > a, .landing-footer .landing-nav > li a, .header-nav > li a{ color: #666; font-size: 14px; line-height: 40px; font-family: "Arial"; display: inline-block; font-weight: 400; cursor: pointer; } .landing-header .landing-nav > li > a{ position: relative; } .landing-header .landing-nav > li > a:hover:after, .landing-header .landing-nav > li.active > a:after { border-bottom: 5px solid #0296FD; border-left: 5px solid rgba(0,0,0,0); border-right: 5px solid rgba(0,0,0,0); bottom: 2px; content: ""; left: calc(50% - 5px); position: absolute; } .landing-header .landing-nav > li > a:hover, .landing-footer .landing-nav > li a:hover, .landing-header .landing-nav > li.active > a { text-decoration: none; color: #2d408c; background: none; } /**FOOTER STYLES**/ .landing-footer{ overflow: hidden; background: #F3F3F3; border-top: 2px solid #0296FD; } .landing-footer p.copy{ float: right; color: #666; font-weight: 300; font-size: 12px; line-height: 40px; margin: 0; } .landing-footer p.copy .dot{ vertical-align: 3px; } /***BILLBOARD**/ .landing-billboard{ background: url("/community-library/accounts/92/920117/imagen-fondo-v1.jpg") repeat-x scroll 0 0; overflow: hidden; -webkit-background-size: cover; -moz-background-size: cover; background-size: cover; } .landing-billboard .billboard-txt{ position: relative; padding-left: 458px; overflow: hidden; } .landing-billboard .landing-container{ position: relative; } .landing-billboard .billboard-txt h1, .landing-billboard .billboard-txt h2{ color: #FFF; font-family: 'Helvetica', serif; } .landing-billboard .billboard-txt h2{ font-size: 20px; line-height: 24px; font-weight: 700; } .landing-billboard .billboard-txt p{ font-size: 18px; line-height: 24px; color: #FFF; } .landing-billboard .billboard-txt h1{ font-size: 40px; line-height: 60px; font-weight: 300; -webkit-text-shadow: 0 0 15px #000; -moz-text-shadow: 0 0 15px #000; text-shadow: 0 0 15px #000; } .landing-billboard img { position: absolute; left: 0; top: 0; } .landing-billboard .btn, .landing-billboard .btn:hover{ width: calc(50% - 10px); float: left; } .btn, .btn:hover{ font-size: 22px; text-align: center; color: #FFFFFF; background: #0072FF; font-family: 'Helvetica', serif; text-decoration: none; width: 200px; padding: 12px 0 10px; display: inline-block; } .btn-content{ text-align: center; overflow: hidden; margin: 60px 0 30px; } .btn-content > .btn:first-child{ margin-right: 10px; } .btn-content > .btn:last-child{ margin-left: 10px; } .btn{ -webkit-transition: all 0.500s; -moz-transition: all 0.500s; transition: all 0.500s; } .btn:hover{ background: #0465db; } /**CATEGORIES**/ h2.section-title, .ideas-slider-content h2{ font-family: 'Helvetica', serif; color: #2d408c; font-size: 30px; line-height: 20px; margin-bottom: 20px; } .landing h2.section-title, .ideas-slider-content h2{ border-bottom: 2px solid #2d408c; padding: 23px 20px 18px; background: #f3f3f3; } .landing-categories-section{ height: 285px; padding: 30px 0 0; } .landing-categories-section .landing-page, .ideas-slider-content .landing-page { border: 1px solid #e7e7e7; padding-bottom: 20px; background: #FFF; } .landing-categories-section .landing-page { height: 300px; position: relative; } .landing-categories-section .landing-page .btn{ bottom: 15px; left: calc(50% - 100px); position: absolute; } .landing-categories-section h2.section-title, .ideas-slider-content h2.section-title{ margin: -1px -1px 20px; } p.category-text{ font-size: 21px; line-height: 27px; font-weight: 300; color: #333333; padding: 0 20px; margin-bottom: 45px; } p.category-text span{ font-weight: 400; } p.category-text a{ color: #2570e0; } .landing-categories{ overflow: hidden; } .landing-categories > li{ float: left; margin: 0 10px; width: 127px; position: relative; z-index: 900; } .landing-categories > li:last-child{ margin-right: 0; } .landing-categories li > a, .landing-categories li > a:hover{ display: block; text-align: center; text-decoration: none; padding: 18px 0 22px; } .landing-categories li > a h3{ font-family: 'Helvetica', serif; font-size: 18px; line-height: 20px; color: #FFFFFF; } .landing-categories li > a p.landing-num-ideas{ font-family: 'Helvetica', serif; display: inline; font-size: 28px; margin: 0; color: #FFFFFF; background: url("/community-library/accounts/92/920117/icono-v1.png") no-repeat scroll 0 -3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); padding-left: 25px; } .landing-categories li > a p.category-hover{ font-size: 14px; line-height: 16px; margin-top: 15px; color: #FFF; display: none; padding: 0 15px; } .landing-categories li > a:hover p.category-hover{ display: block; } .landing-edu{ -webkit-background-color: #0212A0 ; -moz-background-color: #0212A0 ; background-color: #0212A0 ; background-image: -o-linear-gradient(bottom, #0212A0 0%, #060764 100%); background-image: -moz-linear-gradient(bottom, #0212A0 0%, #060764 100%); background-image: -webkit-linear-gradient(bottom, #0212A0 0%, #060764 100%); background-image: -ms-linear-gradient(bottom, #0212A0 0%, #060764 100%); background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, #0212A0 0%, #060764 100%); } .landing-edu2{ -webkit-background-color: #00509C ; -moz-background-color: #00509C ; background-color: #00509C ; background-image: -o-linear-gradient(bottom, #00509C 0%, #003060 100%); background-image: -moz-linear-gradient(bottom, #00509C 0%, #003060 100%); background-image: -webkit-linear-gradient(bottom, #00509C 0%, #003060 100%); background-image: -ms-linear-gradient(bottom, #00509C 0%, #003060 100%); background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, #00509C 0%, #003060 100%); } .landing-sani{ -webkit-background-color: #4988C4 ; -moz-background-color: #4988C4 ; background-color: #4988C4 ; background-image: -o-linear-gradient(bottom, #4988C4 0%, #2C5478 100%); background-image: -moz-linear-gradient(bottom, #4988C4 0%, #2C5478 100%); background-image: -webkit-linear-gradient(bottom, #4988C4 0%, #2C5478 100%); background-image: -ms-linear-gradient(bottom, #4988C4 0%, #2C5478 100%); background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, #4988C4 0%, #2C5478 100%); } .landing-puri{ -webkit-background-color: #0090BC ; -moz-background-color: #0090BC ; background-color: #0090BC ; background-image: -o-linear-gradient(bottom, #0090BC 0%, #005974 100%); background-image: -moz-linear-gradient(bottom, #0090BC 0%, #005974 100%); background-image: -webkit-linear-gradient(bottom, #0090BC 0%, #005974 100%); background-image: -ms-linear-gradient(bottom, #0090BC 0%, #005974 100%); background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, #0090BC 0%, #005974 100%); } .landing-fil{ -webkit-background-color: #6AA7B7 ; -moz-background-color: #6AA7B7 ; background-color: #6AA7B7 ; background-image: -o-linear-gradient(bottom, #6AA7B7 0%, #426771 100%); background-image: -moz-linear-gradient(bottom, #6AA7B7 0%, #426771 100%); background-image: -webkit-linear-gradient(bottom, #6AA7B7 0%, #426771 100%); background-image: -ms-linear-gradient(bottom, #6AA7B7 0%, #426771 100%); background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, #6AA7B7 0%, #426771 100%); } .landing-solar{ -webkit-background-color: #7F488B ; -moz-background-color: #7F488B ; background-color: #7F488B ; background-image: -o-linear-gradient(bottom, #7F488B 0%, #4E2C57 100%); background-image: -moz-linear-gradient(bottom, #7F488B 0%, #4E2C57 100%); background-image: -webkit-linear-gradient(bottom, #7F488B 0%, #4E2C57 100%); background-image: -ms-linear-gradient(bottom, #7F488B 0%, #4E2C57 100%); background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, #7F488B 0%, #4E2C57 100%); } .landing-solar2{ -webkit-background-color: #8C8C8C ; -moz-background-color: #8C8C8C ; background-color: #8C8C8C ; background-image: -o-linear-gradient(bottom, #8C8C8C 0%, #575757 100%); background-image: -moz-linear-gradient(bottom, #8C8C8C 0%, #575757 100%); background-image: -webkit-linear-gradient(bottom, #8C8C8C 0%, #575757 100%); background-image: -ms-linear-gradient(bottom, #8C8C8C 0%, #575757 100%); background-image: linear-gradient(to bottom, #8C8C8C 0%, #575757 100%); } /**Slider*/ /* Arrows */ .landing .slick-prev, .landing .slick-next { position: absolute; display: block !important; height: 30px; width: 20px; line-height: 0; font-size: 0; cursor: pointer; background: url("/community-library/accounts/92/920117/sprite-flechas-v1.png") no-repeat !important; color: transparent; top: 50%; margin-top: -10px; padding: 0; border: none; outline: none; } .landing .slick-prev.slick-disabled, .landing .slick-next.slick-disabled { opacity: 0.25; } .landing .slick-prev { left: -30px; background-position: -12px -12px !important; } .landing .slick-prev:hover, .landing .slick-prev:focus{ background-position: -12px -92px !important;} .landing .slick-next { right: -30px; background-position: -12px -52px !important;} .landing .slick-next:hover, .landing .slick-next:focus{ background-position: -12px -132px !important;} .landing .slick-next:before,.landing .slick-prev:before{ content: ""; } /* Dots */ .landing .slick-slider { margin-bottom: 30px; } .landing .slick-dots { text-align: left; position: absolute; bottom: -45px; list-style: none; display: block; padding: 0; width: 100%; } .landing .slick-dots li { position: relative; display: inline-block; height: 10px; width: 10px; -webkit-border-radius: 50%; -moz-border-radius: 50%; border-radius: 50%; border: 2px solid #2d408c; margin: 0 5px; padding: 0; cursor: pointer; } .landing .slick-dots > li.slick-active{ background: #2d408c; border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0); } .landing .slick-dots li:first-child { margin-left: 0; } .landing .slick-dots li button { border: 0; background: transparent; display: block; height: 10px; width: 10px; outline: none; line-height: 0; font-size: 0; color: transparent; padding: 5px; cursor: pointer; } .ideas-slider-content{ padding: 60px 0; } .ideas-slider-content h2 { margin-bottom: 20px; } #page .landing-idea-content > h3 a, .landing-idea-content > h3 a{ color: #2d408c; font-size: 24px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 26px; padding-bottom: 0; } .landing-idea-content > p{ color: #000; line-height: 22px; } .landing-author{ margin-bottom: 10px; } #page .landing-author a , .landing-author a { color: #2d408c; font-weight: 500; } .landing-featured-ideas .landing-slider-container{ padding-bottom: 15px; } .featured-ideas .landing-idea > div.landing-idea-container{ overflow: hidden; min-height: 224px; border: 1px solid #ececec; position: relative; } .featured-ideas .landing-idea-content { padding: 20px 50px 27px 30px; } .featured-ideas .landing-idea-detail { border-top: 1px solid #ececec; text-align: center; overflow: hidden; } .landing-idea-detail p { color: #7c7c7c; font-weight: 400; line-height: 20px; margin: 0; } #page .landing-idea-support a, .landing-idea-support a, .landing-days span{ background: url("/community-library/accounts/92/920117/sprite-mano-reloj-v1.png") no-repeat; display: inline-block; min-height: 30px; line-height: 30px; padding-left: 36px; } .featured-ideas .landing-idea .landing-idea-image{ float: left; width: 317px; height: auto; } .featured-ideas .landing-idea .landing-idea-support, .featured-ideas .landing-idea .landing-idea-open { display: inline-block; float: left; width: 50%; } .featured-ideas .landing-idea-support{ border-right: 1px solid #ececec; margin-right: -1px; } .featured-ideas .landing-idea-support, .featured-ideas .landing-idea-open{ padding: 10px 0 5px; } #page .landing-idea-support a, .landing-idea-support a{ background-position: -25px -79px ; padding-top: 2px; padding-bottom: 5px; display: inline; color: #2d408c; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 300; } #page .landing-idea-support a:after, .landing-idea-support a:after{ display: block; content: ""; margin: -4px; } .landing-days span { background-position: -25px -178px; color: #2d408c; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 300; } .landing-date > span { font-weight: 500; } .carousel-ideas.slick-slider{ margin-right: -5px; margin-left: -5px; } .carousel-ideas .landing-idea-container { border: 1px solid #ececec; margin-bottom: 1px; } .carousel-ideas .landing-idea-content{ padding: 20px 30px 10px; } .landing-idea-detail{ background: #FFFFFF; } .landing-idea-content, .featured-ideas .landing-idea{ background: #FBFBFB; } .carousel-ideas .landing-idea-detail > div.landing-idea-support, .carousel-ideas .landing-idea-detail > div.landing-idea-open > p:first-child{ border-top: 1px solid #ECECEC; } .carousel-ideas .landing-idea-detail .landing-idea-support > p{ padding: 12px 30px 6px; } .carousel-ideas .landing-idea-detail .landing-idea-open > p:first-child{ padding: 12px 30px 0; } .carousel-ideas .landing-idea-detail .landing-idea-open > p:last-child{ padding: 0 30px 12px; } .carousel-ideas .landing-idea-image { width: calc(100% - 1px); height: 217px; border-right: 1px solid #ececec; } .carousel-ideas .landing-idea > div.landing-idea-container, .carousel-ideas .landing-idea > .landing-idea-image{ margin: 0 5px; } /** Internal Pages **/ #page #header{ -webkit-background-size: 100% 114px !important; -moz-background-size: 100% 114px !important; background-size: 100% 114px !important; margin-bottom: 75px; } #page #header .header-nav{ position: absolute; right: 0; top: 30px; } #page #header .header-nav > li a{ color: #FFF; } #page #header .header-nav > li a:hover{ text-decoration: underline; } #page #header .logo{ border: none; box-shadow: none; background: none; bottom: auto; top: 20px; } .link-btn, .link-btn:hover, #page a{ color: #2d408c; } #page .collapse-expand, #page #top-contributors-link a, #page .section a, .idea-list-tracking{ color: #2d408c !important; } #page .current-category{ background: #2d408c; } #page .current-category a{ color: #FFF !important; } #page .page-title > span, #page #community-name, #page #intro h3, #page .section h4, #page #client-txt h2, #page .box-legend, #page .content h3, #page .extras > .h2, #page .h3,#page .unit, #page .vote-number, #page .user-stats .ideas-stats, #page .user-stats .ideas-stats .number, #page .user-stats .other-stats, #page .user-stats .other-stats .number, #page .user-stats-points, #page .user-stats-points strong{ color: #004e9e; } #page .submit-new-idea, #new-comment-form .submit, .add-tags-form button, .moderator-tags-form button, #idea-file-attachment-form .submit, #idea-tags .tag-links a[rel~="tag"], #tag-cloud-items.manage-mode a{ background: #2d408c !important; color: #FFF !important; } #page .submit-new-idea:hover{ background: #000C75 !important; } #page .idea .stats .rank, #page .idea .stats .rank .number, #page .idea .stats .other{ color: #666; } #page .arrow-up, #page .arrow-down{ display: none; } .agree, .agreed, .disagree, .disagreed{ background: url("/community-library/accounts/92/920117/sprite-votes-v1.png") no-repeat !important; } .agree{ background-position: center -57px !important; } .agreed, .agree:hover{ background-position: center -242px !important; } .disagree{ background-position: center -152px !important; } .disagreed, .disagree:hover{ background-position: center -335px !important; } .directional.up, .directional.down, .active > .directional.up{ background-image: none; } #page ul#listing-nav li a{ background: #0090BC; color: #FFF; } #page ul#listing-nav li a:hover, #page ul#listing-nav li.active a, #page ul#listing-nav li.active a:hover{ background: #FFF; color: #0090BC; } #page ul#listing-nav li a:hover{ border-bottom: 1px solid #FFF; } #page #search form{ background: #000C75 !important; } #page #search{ box-shadow: none; border: 1px solid #d4d4d4; } #header, #official-header{ height: 114px !important; } #page .agreements{ -webkit-border-color: #7E488A; -moz-border-color: #7E488A; border-color: #7E488A; color: #7E488A; } .custom-page #page.no-sidebar #header, .custom-page #footer{ display: none; } .custom-page #page.no-sidebar #main, .custom-page #page.no-sidebar{ margin: 0; } .custom-page #page.no-sidebar{ width: 100%; padding: 0; } .main-section{ padding: 50px 0 0; } .custom-page-content{ background: #FFFFFF; } .members,.info-member{ overflow: hidden; } .member{ width: calc(50% - 20px); float: left; padding: 40px 0; min-height: 524px; } .members .member:first-child{ margin-right: 20px; } .members .member:last-child{ margin-left: 20px; } .members.nobb .member{ border-bottom: none; } .info-member img{ float: left; margin-right: 15px; } .info-member h5{ margin: 74px 0 5px; font-weight: bold; padding: 0; font-size: 18px; line-height: 24px; } .judges .info-member h5{ color: #0396fd; } .experts .info-member h5{ color: #2d408c; } .info-member p{ font-size: 14px; line-height: 18px; font-weight: bold; color: #333333; } .info-member p{ margin: 0; } .bio-member{ margin-top: 15px; } .bio-member p{ font-size: 14px; line-height: 18px; color: #666; margin-bottom: 15px; } .member, .bb-blue, .bb-lblue{ position: relative; } .member.nobb:after{ background: none; } .experts .member:after,.bb-blue:after{ content: ""; position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; height: 1px; width: 100%; background-image: -o-linear-gradient(to right, #344bab 0%, #f5f6fb 100%); background-image: -moz-llinear-gradient(to right, #344bab 0%, #f5f6fb 100%); background-image: -webkit-linear-gradient(to right, #344bab 0%, #f5f6fb 100%); background-image: -ms-linear-gradient(to right, #344bab 0%, #f5f6fb 100%); background-image: linear-gradient(to right, #344bab 0%, #f5f6fb 100%); } .experts h2.section-title{ color: #2d408c; padding-bottom: 20px; margin-bottom: 0; } .judges .member:after, .bb-lblue:after{ content: ""; position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; height: 1px; width: 100%; background-image: -o-linear-gradient(to right, #0396fd 0%, #ecf7ff 100%); background-image: -moz-llinear-gradient(to right, #0396fd 0%, #ecf7ff 100%); background-image: -webkit-linear-gradient(to right, #0396fd 0%, #ecf7ff 100%); background-image: -ms-linear-gradient(to right, #0396fd 0%, #ecf7ff 100%); background-image: linear-gradient(to right, #0396fd 0%, #ecf7ff 100%); } .judges h2.section-title{ padding-bottom: 20px; color: #0396fd; margin-bottom: 0; } .experts .member { min-height: 440px; } /** Custom Page 2 Styles **/ .custom-page-2{ padding: 20px 40px; background: #FFF; min-height: 350px; } .custom-page-2 p{ color: #666; font-size: 18px; line-height: 24px; margin-bottom: 10px; } ul.pagination{ width: 580px !important; } .winners{ margin: 30px 0; } .winners h4 { color: #FFFFFF; font-size: 20px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 22px; } .winners .list-prizes{ margin-bottom: 10px; } .winners .list-prizes h5 { display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 22px; padding: 0 20px 0 0; width: calc(100% - 80px); color: #FFFFFF; -webkit-box-sizing: border-box; -moz-box-sizing: border-box; box-sizing: border-box; } .winners .list-prizes > li { line-height: 40px; } .winning-idea .btn, .winning-idea .btn:hover,.winners .list-prizes .btn, .winners .list-prizes .btn:hover { text-transform: uppercase; background: none repeat scroll 0 0 #0072ff; display: inline-block; float: none; width: auto; color: #FFFFFF !important; text-decoration: none; } .winners .list-prizes .btn, .winners .list-prizes .btn:hover { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 14px; padding: 5px 10px; vertical-align: top; margin-top: 5px; } .winning-ideas-content{ padding: 60px 0 0; } .ideas-title { font-size: 34px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 36px; } .winning-idea { border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0; } .winning-idea .landing-container{ padding: 60px 0; } .winning-idea .btn, .winning-idea .btn:hover{ font-size: 18px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 20px; padding: 11px 25px; } .winners .list-prizes .btn:hover, .winning-idea .btn:hover{ background: none repeat scroll 0 0 #0465db; } .winners-links{ color: #0072ff !important; } .winning-idea .image { float: left; margin: 12px 30px 0 0; width: 15%; } .winning-idea .desc-item { float: left; height: auto; width: 80%; } a.winner-author-link { color: #0072ff !important; font-size: 19px; font-weight: 600; } .desc-item > h3 { line-height: 30px; } .list-prizes .ideaName { font-weight: 400; } .landing-billboard.landing-winners .billboard-txt h1{ padding-bottom: 0; } .landing-billboard.landing-winners .btn-content{ margin: 24px 0; } .landing-billboard.landing-winners .landing-main-txt .box-grey { margin-top: 18px; } .landing-billboard.landing-winners .box-grey { background: none repeat scroll 0 0 #ecedef; padding: 10px 0; text-align: center; margin: 20px 0; } .landing-billboard.landing-winners .box-grey a , .landing-billboard.landing-winners .box-grey a:hover{ color: #2570e0; }
